slice: Slice 23A Module Manifest And Registry Foundation

reject_scope: Install execution dependency additions public engine marketplace fixed native UI
acceptance_gates: Manifest/resource/schema parity; no execution; execute-only inspection; protected metadata redaction
validation: cargo fmt/check; focused registry tests; provider boundary; DESI/BPRC/SSARR/SUWRF/TMB/SACB; personal-info guard; diff check; self-sufficient-agent-runtime-readiness classification as accepted inspect-only foundation not runtime completion
